abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Juggernaut
abilities.text: This model reduces all damage dealt to it to 3 (if more than 3).

actions.name: Vivisect
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is not killed, this model gains a Focused token.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Study Opponent
triggers.text: This model gains either a Focused or Shielded token.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Horrifying Revelation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: The target suffers a (fortitude) for every Remains marker within 3" of it. If this attack receives a raise, the target gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Jury Rig
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Discard a card. Draw a non-joker card in this model's discard pile with a value equal to or less than the value of the discarded card +1.
